rows.notes: Top-of-page title/header. Handwriting of a few letters is indistinct (especially the last word: 'pmi' is my best visual match). No amounts on this line.

Amounts columns aligned with vertical rules. Pounds column blank/zero, shillings clearly '9', pence '8' with small quarter-farthing/quarter mark visible (interpreted as 0.25). Description is legible; small uncertainty in final abbreviation 'L: Tew'.
rows.english_description: Fine paid to Hartley relating to the Little Tew tenancy.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fine paid to Hartley relating to the Little Tew tenancy, amounting to £0 9s 8¼d.

rows.notes: Pounds '1', shillings '10' and pence '5' with a clear halfpenny loop ('ob') interpreted as 0.5. Surname 'Fearey/Ferrey' reading uncertain from handwriting; chosen 'Fearey' as closest visual match.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Wells for the Clifton Ferry, amounting to £1 10s 5½d.

rows.notes: Pounds column blank/zero, shillings '11' clear. Pence shows '6' with a halfpenny loop (interpreted as 0.5). Description and initials legible.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to B. Gardiner relating to Little Tew, amounting to £0 11s 6½d.

rows.notes: Shillings '2' and pence '3' with halfpenny sign (0.5). Surname 'Barnwells' readable; small flourish but unambiguous.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Ann Barnwell for matters relating to Little Tew, amounting to £0 2s 3½d.

rows.notes: Pounds '3', shillings '9' clear. Pence '2' with a small quarter mark (interpreted as 0.25). 'Do' = ditto; description is clear.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to W. Taylor for Little Tew, amounting to £3 9s 2¼d.

rows.notes: Pounds '2', shillings '6' clear. Pence looks like '1' with a '3q' style mark (three‑farthings) interpreted as 0.75. Place-name spelling uncertain; 'Trethewin' is my best reading of the handwriting.
rows.english_description: Payment to J. Hodges relating to the Trethewin tenancy or property.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to J. Hodges relating to Trethewin, amounting to £2 6s 1¾d.

rows.notes: Pounds '1', shillings '18' clearly written. Pence '5' with halfpenny loop (0.5). Description readable.
rows.english_description: Payment to Ann Burgis concerning the Benson property or tenancy.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Ann Burgis concerning Benson, amounting to £1 18s 5½d.

rows.notes: Pounds '3', shillings '6', pence '3' with halfpenny 'ob' sign. 'Ann Becks' legible.
rows.english_description: Payment to Ann Becks relating to Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Ann Becks relating to Little Tew, amounting to £3 6s 3½d.

rows.notes: Subtotal line across the entries above. Numerals are aligned with the vertical ruling lines and the pence shows a clear quarter sign (0.25).
Clear centered section header 'Soluta varia'. No amounts on this line.

rows.description: To Mr Townsend for work done in bringing a New Pipe of the Hincksey water to supply the Kitchen as by Bill
rows.notes: Description long but legible. Amount aligns to columns: pounds '2', shillings '14', pence '10' (no fraction).
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Townsend for installing a new pipe to bring Hinksey water to the kitchen, as per bill.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Townsend for installing a new pipe to bring Hinksey water to the kitchen, amounting to £2 14s 10d.

rows.description: To 877l.10s.3d in 3 per Cent Cons. at 6 8¼ per Ct.
rows.notes: This line describes purchase/conversion; amount '598.18.0' aligned in the money columns. The interest/rate notation '6 8¼' is legible but slightly cramped, so confidence lowered for that part.
rows.english_description: Payment relating to 3% Consols (investment) referenced with a face figure and rate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment relating to 3% Consols (investment), amounting to £598 18s 0d.

rows.notes: Commission line is on its own row with amount clearly '1.2.0'. Text and numbers are distinct.
rows.english_description: Commission charged (likely on the investment or securities transaction).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Commission charged, amounting to £1 2s 0d.

rows.notes: Bracketed subtotal/result of the two preceding lines (598.18.0 + 1.2.0 = 600.0.0). The brace is present on the page; amount '600.0.0' is clear and aligned.
Name and trade legible. Amount columns show '12.2.0' clearly.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Hickman for plumbing work.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Hickman for plumbing work, amounting to £12 2s 0d.

rows.notes: Description 'Mr Bush as by Bill' readable. Amount '10.4.3' clear in columns.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Bush as stated on his bill (specific service not detailed).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bush as stated on his bill, amounting to £10 4s 3d.

rows.description: To Mr Davis & Mrs Hemming on Acct of Acton
rows.notes: Shillings read as '4' and pence '0'. The names 'Davis & Mrs Hemming' are legible though spacing is tight; 'Acton' reading of the place is my best interpretation from the handwriting.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Davis and Mrs Hemming on account of matters concerning Acton.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davis and Mrs Hemming on account of Acton, amounting to £0 4s 0d.

rows.description: Allowed J Hartley inclosing extra Expences & L: Tew
rows.notes: Amount '5.18.8' clear. Word 'inclosing' and 'Expences' spelled in period form; 'L: Tew' abbreviation appears again. Minor uncertainty in exact punctuation but meaning clear.
rows.english_description: Payment allowed to J. Hartley covering extra expenses relating to Little Tew.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment allowed to J. Hartley including extra expenses for Little Tew, amounting to £5 18s 8d.

rows.description: To Mr Davis Bill as Exhib'r & Libr'n for 2 years
rows.notes: Amount '6.6.0' clear and aligned. Abbreviations 'Exhib'r' and 'Libr'n' appear in the original; interpreted literally.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Davis as exhibitor and librarian for two years, amounting to £6 6s 0d.

rows.notes: Single short line 'St Thomas' appears beneath previous entry with no separate amount in the money columns; likely a sub-note or place reference. No amounts visible for this row.
rows.english_description: Entry relating to St Thomas (parish or chapel) with no amount recorded.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Entry relating to St Thomas (parish or chapel); no amount recorded.

rows.description: Allowed B: Gardiner Inclosing Expenses for the Tenement formerly Cives now Renewed

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to B. Gardiner for enclosing expenses for the tenement formerly Cives and now renewed, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.english_description_with_amount: College subscription to the Radcliffe Infirmary, amounting to £5 5s 0d.

rows.notes: Amount '4.16.6' legible. Abbreviation 'Tho:' for Thomas clear. Handwriting of 'Lamplighting' slightly contracted but readable.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thomas Dodd for lamplighting for a year, amounting to £4 16s 6d.
